Title: PM-01: GitHub Project Setup
Body:
## Goal
Set up GitHub Project management infrastructure for the CollabAI distributed systems project.

## Description
Create and configure the GitHub Project board to track all project tasks across 3 sprints. This establishes the central hub for team collaboration, sprint planning, and work tracking.

## Tasks
- Create GitHub Project board with columns: To Do, In Progress, Review, Done
- Configure automated workflows for issue transitions
- Create and organize labels (backend, frontend, api, auth, db, testing, etc.)
- Set up sprint milestones (Sprint 1, 2, 3)
- Import all tasks with proper dependencies
- Configure team access and permissions
- Create project documentation and README

## Acceptance Criteria
- GitHub Project board is fully functional with all columns automated
- All tasks are imported and properly labeled
- Team members have appropriate access levels
- Sprint milestones are created and linked
- Dependencies are correctly mapped
- Board is ready for Sprint 1 kickoff
- Team can track progress in real-time

## Story Points: 3

Title: ARCH-01: DRF + OOP Guidelines
Body:
## Goal
Define backend architecture standards for Django REST Framework (DRF) and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles.

## Description
Establish comprehensive architectural guidelines following OOP paradigms (Requirement #5). All backend code must use inheritance, polymorphism, encapsulation, and abstraction. This also ensures REST APIs follow DRF best practices (Requirement #4).

## Tasks
- Design Django app structure (apps, serializers, views, services, permissions)
- Define OOP conventions (inheritance, composition, abstraction, encapsulation)
- Create naming conventions for models, serializers, views, and endpoints
- Establish permission and authentication patterns
- Document middleware integration strategy
- Create code organization best practices document
- Design base classes and mixins for reusability
- Create architectural diagram showing component relationships

## Acceptance Criteria
- Architecture document exists and covers OOP + DRF best practices
- Base classes and mixins are defined for reuse
- Backend skeleton is initialized
- Conventions are clear for all team members
- All backend tasks align with these guidelines

## Key Requirements Covered
✅ Requirement #4: RESTful API Framework
✅ Requirement #5: OOP Programming

## Story Points: 5
## Dependencies: PM-01

Title: AUTH-01: Register API
Body:
## Goal
Implement user registration endpoint with validation and secure password handling.

## Description
Create the registration API endpoint that allows new users to create accounts. Endpoint follows REST over HTTP/HTTPS (Requirement #2) and DRF conventions.

## Tasks
- Create RegisterSerializer with email and password fields
- Implement email uniqueness validation
- Enforce strong password requirements
- Hash passwords using Django's make_password utility
- Create POST /api/auth/register endpoint (HTTP/HTTPS)
- Return 201 with user data
- Implement proper error responses
- Write unit tests
- Document endpoint in Swagger

## Acceptance Criteria
- User can register with valid credentials
- Passwords are hashed and secure
- Endpoint is RESTful over HTTP/HTTPS
- Tests pass and Swagger docs exist

## Key Requirements Covered
✅ Requirement #2: HTTP/HTTPS Communication
✅ Requirement #4: RESTful API Framework
✅ Requirement #8: Authentication

## Story Points: 5
## Dependencies: ARCH-01

Title: DB-01: Core Models
Body:
## Goal
Create foundational database models for the system architecture.

## Description
Build the core models that form the backbone of the application data structure, following OOP principles with base classes and inheritance.

## Tasks
- Create abstract BaseModel with id, created_at, updated_at fields
- Implement User model
- Implement Profile model
- Create Workspace model for multi-tenancy
- Create Organization model
- Implement Role model
- Implement Permission model
- Create initial database migration
- Write model unit tests
- Document model relationships

## Acceptance Criteria
- Core models exist and are related properly
- Migrations generate without errors
- Models follow OOP structure and ARCH-01 guidelines
- Tests verify relationships and constraints

## Key Requirements Covered
✅ Requirement #5: OOP Programming
✅ Requirement #7: ORM & Database

## Story Points: 6
## Dependencies: ARCH-01

Title: AUTH-02: Login + JWT
Body:
## Goal
Implement JWT-based authentication with login endpoint and token refresh mechanism.

## Description
Create the login system that authenticates users and provides JWT tokens for accessing protected endpoints. All endpoints are RESTful over HTTP/HTTPS (Requirement #2).

## Tasks
- Create LoginSerializer
- Implement POST /api/auth/login (HTTP/HTTPS)
- Generate JWT access and refresh tokens
- Implement POST /api/auth/refresh
- Implement POST /api/auth/logout
- Create JWT authentication class for DRF
- Add JWT to all protected endpoints
- Write tests for login flow

## Acceptance Criteria
- User can login and receive JWT tokens
- Protected endpoints require valid JWT
- Tokens expire and refresh correctly
- Swagger documentation is complete

## Key Requirements Covered
✅ Requirement #2: HTTP/HTTPS Communication
✅ Requirement #8: Authentication & Authorization

## Story Points: 4
## Dependencies: AUTH-01

Title: MIDDLEWARE-01: Logging + Auth
Body:
## Goal
Implement middleware for request logging and JWT authentication enforcement.

## Description
Create middleware that logs all API requests and enforces authentication. Integrates with AUTH-01 and AUTH-02.

## Tasks
- Create RequestLoggingMiddleware
- Log request metadata (method, endpoint, user_id)
- Log response status and timing
- Create JWT authentication middleware
- Implement RBAC checks
- Add request ID tracking
- Write middleware tests

## Acceptance Criteria
- All requests are logged
- Unauthenticated requests are rejected
- Middleware integrates with JWT auth flow
- Tests verify logging and auth enforcement

## Story Points: 5
## Dependencies: AUTH-01, AUTH-02

Title: FE-01: React + Context Setup
Body:
## Goal
Initialize the React frontend with Context API, routing, and API client configuration.

## Description
Set up the foundational frontend architecture. All API calls will use HTTP/HTTPS REST endpoints from backend (Requirement #2).

## Tasks
- Initialize React project
- Configure React Router
- Create AuthContext
- Create API client (axios)
- Configure environment variables
- Build layout components

## Acceptance Criteria
- React app runs
- Context API works
- API client can call backend endpoints

## Story Points: 5
## Dependencies: PM-01

Title: FE-02: Auth UI
Body:
## Goal
Build login and registration user interface components.

## Description
Create UI for authentication and integrate with RESTful endpoints over HTTP/HTTPS.

## Tasks
- Build Register/Login pages
- Integrate POST /api/auth/register (AUTH-01)
- Integrate POST /api/auth/login (AUTH-02)
- Store JWT tokens in Context/localStorage
- Implement logout and redirects

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can register and login
- Tokens are stored securely
- UI follows REST API flow

## Story Points: 5
## Dependencies: AUTH-01, AUTH-02

Title: DB-02: 20+ Models + Migration
Body:
## Goal
Expand database to include 20+ production models with complete migration strategy.

## Description
Create comprehensive data models covering all aspects of the project management system. Models follow OOP structure and ORM best practices.

## Tasks
- Create Project, Task, Comment, ActivityLog, Notification, Attachment
- Create AIRequest, CacheEntity, TeamMember, Subscription, Integration
- Create Label, TaskLabel, ProjectMember, WorkspaceInvite, AuditLog
- Add indexes and constraints
- Write comprehensive migrations

## Acceptance Criteria
- 20+ models created and related
- Migrations apply cleanly
- Models follow OOP structure (ARCH-01)
- Tests verify relationships and constraints

## Story Points: 7
## Dependencies: DB-01

Title: MT-01: Multi-Tenancy Data Isolation
Body:
## Goal
Implement data isolation for multi-tenant architecture.

## Description
Ensure complete data isolation between workspaces. All queries filter by workspace_id.

## Tasks
- Create TenantQuerySet
- Implement tenant middleware
- Apply workspace filtering in models
- Add tenant permission checks
- Write isolation tests

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users cannot access other tenants' data
- All endpoints respect tenant boundaries
- Tests prove isolation

## Story Points: 5
## Dependencies: DB-02

Title: API-01: CRUD APIs
Body:
## Goal
Implement basic CRUD endpoints for core resources.

## Description
Build RESTful API endpoints over HTTP/HTTPS (Requirement #2) using DRF (Requirement #4).

## Tasks
- Create Project CRUD endpoints (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
- Create Task CRUD endpoints
- Create Comment CRUD endpoints
- Create ActivityLog read endpoint
- Add pagination, sorting, filtering
- Implement permissions and validation
- Write tests
- Document endpoints in Swagger

## Acceptance Criteria
- CRUD endpoints work correctly over HTTP/HTTPS
- REST conventions followed
- Tests pass and Swagger docs complete

## Key Requirements Covered
✅ Requirement #2: HTTP/HTTPS Communication
✅ Requirement #3: 20+ Endpoints
✅ Requirement #4: RESTful API Framework

## Story Points: 6
## Dependencies: DB-02

Title: CACHE-01: Redis
Body:
## Goal
Integrate Redis for caching frequently accessed data.

## Description
Implement caching strategy for REST endpoints to improve response times.

## Tasks
- Configure Redis
- Cache project/task lists
- Add invalidation rules
- Write cache tests

## Acceptance Criteria
- Cache improves performance
- Data is consistent after invalidation
- Tests pass

## Story Points: 5
## Dependencies: API-01

Title: TEST-01: Unit Tests
Body:
## Goal
Write unit tests for models, serializers, permissions, and business logic.

## Description
Achieve 80%+ coverage and validate critical backend functionality.

## Tasks
- Test models and serializers
- Test permissions and auth flow
- Test multi-tenant isolation
- Test cache invalidation
- Configure coverage reporting

## Acceptance Criteria
- 80%+ coverage
- Tests pass reliably
- CI runs tests

## Story Points: 5
## Dependencies: API-01

Body:

- GET /api/tasks/
- GET /api/activity-logs/

## Tasks

- Integrate API data

## Acceptance Criteria

- Handles errors gracefully

## Endpoint Dependencies

- PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/

## Acceptance Criteria
